sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82188" key="perissopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περισσο-ποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n82188.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making odd</tr_>, of numbers, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4017.tlg001:131:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Syrian.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Metaph.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">131.36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
